title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in. Tried password reset multiple times with no success.

title: Payment Checkout Failure
description: User receives 'Error 402' when attempting to pay with a Visa card.

title: Mobile App Crash on Android
description: Application closes immediately upon opening on Pixel 7 devices.

title: Subscription Upgrade Not Applied
description: Paid for Premium tier, but account features are still locked to Basic.

title: Invoice PDF Generation Error
description: Clicking 'Download Invoice' results in a 500 Server Error page.

title: API Key Activation Delay
description: New API keys are showing as 'Pending' for over 4 hours.

title: Broken Images in User Profiles
description: Avatar uploads are failing to display in the main dashboard view.

title: Grammar Typo on FAQ Page
description: Spelling mistake found in the 'Refund Policy' section of the help center.

title: Cannot Delete Empty Workspace
description: Receiving a database constraint error when trying to remove a test workspace.

title: 2FA SMS Code Not Arriving
description: Users in the UK region are reporting they are not receiving authentication texts.
